# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: 'azurearm'
      kind: 'ServicePrincipal'
      metadata:
        name: cicd-sp
      properties:
        passwordNeverExpires: true

    - apiVersion: 'azurerm-roleassignment'
      kind: 'RoleAssignment'
      metadata:
        name: cicd-subscription-contributor
      properties:
        roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/<your_subscription_id>/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c'
        principalId: $(servicePrincipalCicd.id)
        scope: /subscriptions/<your_subscription_id>

    - apiVersion: 'azurerm-roleassignments'
    kind: 'RoleAssignment'
    metadata:
      name: cicd-resource-contributor
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/<your_subscription_id>/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/acdd72a7-3385-48ef-bdas-a20b6049de8e'
      principalId: $(servicePrincipalCicd.id)
      scope: /subscriptions/<your_subscription_id>/resourceGroups/<your_resource_group>
